releases.author: manogna4
releases.description:
### features
+ pin/unpin all leaves
+ reveal workspace-tabs (tag-panel, backlinks, outline, etc.)
+ reveal some plugin tabs (recent-files, calendar, etc.)
releases.name: initial release
